base_scheme.description: Equal-weight buffered book with top-20% entry universe, 5% max weight, 20-stock minimum, and calibrated Almgren-Chriss costs.

schedule_assumptions.2W: Every other weekly signal date, starting from the first date in each window.
schedule_assumptions.4W: First available signal date of each calendar month.
schedule_assumptions.8W: First available signal date of every second calendar month, starting from the first month in each window.

result.null_hypothesis: 1W_equal_weight_buffered is not worse than any competitor on aligned test-period IC.
